authors: Curd B. Knüpfer Yunkang Yang Mike Cowburn a Digital Democracy
raw_title: The Logic of Connective Faction: How Digitally Networked Elites and Hyper-Partisan Media Radicalize Politics
title_en: The Logic of Connective Faction: How Digitally Networked Elites and Hyper-Partisan Media Radicalize Politics
title_zh: 连接性派系的逻辑：数字网络精英与极端党派媒体如何激化政治
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了数字时代政治精英如何通过网络连接，与极端党派媒体合作，导致政治变得更加极端化。它解释了这种“连接性派系”如何运作并影响政治环境。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how political elites in the digital age use network connections and collaborate with hyper-partisan media to make politics more extreme. It explains how this 'connective faction' operates and impacts the political environment.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体时代政治精英网络化与媒体极端化对政治进程的影响机制。
research_direction_en: Investigating the mechanisms by which networked political elites and media extremism affect political processes in the digital media era.
